results.name: happy_path
results.claim: A well-formed matched pair settles successfully

results.name: replay_settled_pair
results.claim: A pair that has been settled cannot be settled again

results.name: replay_swapped_order
results.claim: Settling (b, a) after (a, b) must also be blocked

results.name: mismatched_pair_id
results.claim: Pair where pair_id values differ must be rejected

results.name: self_pairing
results.claim: A proof paired with itself must be rejected

results.name: tampered_pair_id
results.claim: Mutating .pair_id after signing must invalidate the proof

results.name: expired_pair
results.claim: A pair whose window ended before settlement must be rejected

results.name: signature_stripped
results.claim: Pair where one proof's signature has been zeroed must be rejected

results.name: concurrent_settlement_race
results.claim: Concurrent settlements of the same pair must result in exactly one acceptance

results.name: tampered_window_extension
results.claim: Extending valid_until past the signed value must be rejected
